mapper.select: SELECT * FROM danh_gia_chuyen WHERE ma_chuyen = #{maChuyen} ORDER BY thoi_gian_tao DESC
SELECT * FROM danh_gia_chuyen WHERE ma_chuyen = #{maChuyen} AND ma_khach = #{maKhach}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM danh_gia_chuyen WHERE ma_chuyen = #{maChuyen}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO danh_gia_chuyen (ma_chuyen, ma_khach, diem_so, nhan_xet) VALUES (#{maChuyen}, #{maKhach}, #{diemSo}, #{nhanXet})
mapper.select: SELECT dg.ma, dg.diem_so, dg.nhan_xet, dg.thoi_gian_tao, kh.ho_ten, td.diem_di, td.diem_den FROM danh_gia_chuyen dg INNER JOIN khach_hang kh ON dg.ma_khach = kh.ma INNER JOIN chuyen_xe cx ON dg.ma_chuyen = cx.ma INNER JOIN tuyen_duong td ON cx.ma_tuyen = td.ma WHERE dg.nhan_xet IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(dg.nhan_xet) <> '' ORDER BY dg.thoi_gian_tao DESC LIMIT #{gioiHan}
